summary: Tested ZET Mindshare new features: Email Auth (backend), Copy/Mirror/VoiceInput tools (frontend). Fixed critical bug where Voice Input crashed due to undefined 'language' variable.

bugs_fixed.issue: Voice Input tool crashed with 'ReferenceError: language is not defined' at line 743
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed 'const { t } = useLanguage()' to 'const { t, language } = useLanguage()' at line 33

passed_tests: Login page shows Google + Email options
Email registration works (backend: /api/auth/register)
Email login works (backend: /api/auth/login)
Duplicate email registration rejected with 400
Invalid password rejected with 401
Non-existent email rejected with 401
Session token from email auth works for protected routes
Copy tool visible in Editor toolbox
Mirror tool visible in Editor toolbox
Voice Input tool visible in Editor toolbox
Voice Input panel opens with microphone button
Voice Input panel shows 'Click to start speaking' text
Voice Input panel shows language setting
Mirror panel opens with 'Mirror / Rotate' title
Mirror panel has rotation slider
Mirror panel has preset buttons (-90, -45, +45, +90)
Element context menu (3-dots) shows Copy option
Element context menu shows Mirror option
Ctrl+C and Ctrl+V shortcuts work (tested in UI)
ZETA chat receives full document content (text, shape, image, chart, table)
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug: Editor.js line 33 needed 'language' from useLanguage() hook for Voice Input STT language setting
test_credentials: Email auth tested with dynamically generated test emails
seed_data_creation: Test users created via API during pytest runs (test_xxx@example.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: (1) Email auth - register/login/session working, (2) Copy tool in toolbox + context menu, (3) Mirror tool with rotation slider and presets, (4) Voice Input (STT) with microphone button, (5) Ctrl+C/V shortcuts. Fixed critical bug where Voice Input crashed - missing 'language' variable from useLanguage hook.
mocked_apis: Google Drive file operations (mock token only)

features_tested_summary.email_auth_register: VERIFIED - Creates user, returns session token cookie
features_tested_summary.copy_tool_toolbox: VERIFIED - Tool button visible in editor toolbox
features_tested_summary.mirror_tool_toolbox: VERIFIED - Tool button visible in editor toolbox
features_tested_summary.voiceinput_tool_toolbox: VERIFIED - Tool button visible in editor toolbox
features_tested_summary.voiceinput_panel: VERIFIED - Shows microphone, 'Click to start speaking', language setting
features_tested_summary.mirror_panel: VERIFIED - Horizontal/Vertical buttons (when element selected), rotation slider, presets
features_tested_summary.context_menu_copy: VERIFIED - Copy option in element 3-dot menu
features_tested_summary.context_menu_mirror: VERIFIED - Mirror option in element 3-dot menu

bug_fix_details.root_cause: useLanguage() hook destructured only 't' but 'language' was used in Voice Input STT
bug_fix_details.fix_applied: Changed line 33 from 'const { t } = useLanguage()' to 'const { t, language } = useLanguage()'
